mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_assignment_rule SET rule_name = #{ruleName}, category = #{category}, priority = #{priority}, target_group_id = #{targetGroupId}, target_queue_id = #{targetQueueId}, target_user_id = #{targetUserId}, weight = #{weight}, enabled = #{enabled} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ticket_assignment_rule WHERE enabled = 1 AND (category IS NULL OR category = #{category}) AND (priority IS NULL OR priority = #{priority}) ORDER BY weight DESC, CASE WHEN category IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END + CASE WHEN priority IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
